name: Easy Chicken in Beer
recipeIngredient: 3 chicken breasts with the bone, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a pan.
2. Stir together the onion soup and both types of beer.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until the chicken is cooked through. If it starts drying out, add a little chicken broth or water.
6. Serve with plain rice.
Miriam
